ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, pasted plain-text links are converted to Markdown links with fetched page titles.
ast.target: 启用后，粘贴的纯文本链接将转换为带有获取页面标题的 Markdown 链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No raw links were found in the selected text.
ast.target: 在选中文本中未找到原始链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You appear to be offline. Links were left unchanged.
ast.target: 您似乎处于离线状态。链接保持不变。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Name the URL links in the selected text
ast.target: 为选中文本中的 URL 链接命名
